class.name: Priest
class.help:
Class: Priest 

 Description: 
 This class has the most potent /c$9 healing spells /c*, /c$9 defensive spells, as well as assistance spells /c* and can wear cloth armor to improve defence.

class.name: Summoner
class.help:
Class: Summoner 

 Description: 
 This class has the most potent /c$9 curse spells /c* and /c$9 summoning spells /c* and can wear cloth armor to improve defence.

class.name: Wizard
class.help:
Class: Wizard 

 Description: 
 Committed to studying /c$9 chaos spells /c*. Good at using /c$9 destructive spells /c*. They can wear cloth armor.

class.name: Magician
class.help:
Class: Magician 

 Description: 
 Committed to studying /c$9 earth spells /c* that contain /c$9 temptation and transforming magic /c*. Possessing relatively strong /c$9 melee combat abilities /c* too. They can wear cloth armor.

class.name: Protector
class.help:
Class: Protector 

 Description: 
 Good at /c$9 defending themselves with a shield /c*. The best /c$9 tank /c* in battle. They can wear heavy armor.

class.name: Warrior
class.help:
Class: Warrior 

 Description: 
 Good at using an /c$9 axe /c* to create /c$9 an excellent amount of damage /c*. They can wear heavy armor.

class.name: Swordsman
class.help:
Class: Swordsman 

 Description: 
 Good at /c$9 sword skills /c* and able to give immense damage in /c$9 a short period of time /c*. This class can wear heavy armor.

class.name: Spearman
class.help:
Class: Spearman 

 Description: 
 Good at /c$9 spear skills /c* and able to give an /c$9 immense piercing damage /c*. This class can wear heavey armor.

class.name: Archer
class.help:
Class: Archer 

 Description: 
 Good at /c$9 long bow skills /c* and /c$9 long ranged attacks /c*. This class can wear light armor.

class.name: Weaponsmith
class.help:
Class: Weaponsmith 

 Description: 
 Good at forging /c$9 metal weapons /c*, digging ore, lumbering and controlling robots. This class can wear light armor.

class.name: Armorsmith
class.help:
Class: Armorsmith 

 Description: 
 They are famous for making /c$9 heavy and light armor /c*, collecting, lumbering and controlling robots. This class can wear light armor.

class.name: Tailor
class.help:
Class: Tailor 

 Description: 
 Good at making /c$9 cloth armor and backpacks /c*, collecting, fishing, and controlling robots. This class can wear light armor.

class.name: Technician
class.help:
Class: Technician 

 Description: 
 Good at making /c$9 robot accessories, ornaments and staves /c*. This class is also adept at collecting, lumbering, and controlling robots. This class can wear leather armor.

class.name: Chef
class.help:
Class: Chef 

 Description: 
 Good at cooking /c$9 nutritious food which can improve abilities /c*. This class is also adept at collecting, fishing, and controlling robots. This class can wear light armor.
